buildCommand: pnpm install && npx prisma generate && cd apps/control-center && pnpm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://*.vercel.app wss://*.supabase.co;
